default.title: Research neighbourhoods
default.description: Compare areas by commute, rent, and expat community.

default.title: Confirm work permit / visa documents
default.description: Gather originals and copies before departure.

default.title: Arrange temporary accommodation
default.description: Book short-term stay for your first weeks.

default.title: Notify home country bank of move
default.description: Avoid card blocks and set travel notices.

default.title: Download offline maps + transport apps
default.description: Save maps and local transit apps before arrival.

default.title: Get a local SIM card
default.description: Set up a local number for banking and admin.

default.title: Open a local bank account
default.description: Bring ID, proof of address, and employment letter.

default.title: Register address with local authority
default.description: Complete required registration for your visa.

default.title: Register with a GP / health centre
default.description: Enrol in local healthcare if applicable.

default.title: Apply for tax number
default.description: Get your local tax ID (PPS, Steuer-ID, etc.).

default.title: Review health insurance coverage
default.description: Confirm public or private coverage meets your needs.

default.title: Notify home country of address change
default.description: Update tax residency and electoral records if needed.

default.title: Prepare for first local tax return
default.description: Collect payslips and employer statements.

default.title: Verify residency clock is running
default.description: Confirm days present count toward PR eligibility.

default.title: Check credential recognition status
default.description: Start professional qualification recognition if needed.

default.title: Run salary benchmark for your role
default.description: Compare your pay to local market rates.

default.title: File full tax return in destination country
default.description: Complete annual filing with local authority.

default.title: Check PR eligibility progress
default.description: Review days present and absence limits.

default.title: Review pension continuity
default.description: Understand cross-border pension implications.

default.title: Check visa renewal requirements
default.description: Start renewal paperwork before expiry.

default.title: Citizenship pathway assessment
default.description: Review naturalisation requirements and timeline.

default.title: Cross-border estate / will review
default.description: Update wills for assets in multiple countries.

default.title: Return vs. stay reflection
default.description: Use community resources to evaluate long-term plans.
